MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_lnb_tp.LongName: LNB True Positive Responses for 0-BACK, 1-BACK and 2-BACK trials

cnb_lnb_fp.LongName: LNB False Positive Responses for 0-BACK, 1-BACK and 2-BACK trials

cnb_lnb_rtc.LongName: LNB Median Response Time for True Positive responses for 0-BACK, 1-BACK and 2-BACK response

cnb_lnb_mcr.LongName: LNB True Positive Responses for 1-BACK and 2-BACK Trials

cnb_lnb_mrtc.LongName: LNB Median Response Time for True Positive responses for 1-BACK and 2-BACK response

cnb_lnb_cnt_200.LongName: LNB Total Count of Responses Under 200 milliseconds

cnb_lnb_lrnr.LongName: LNB Longest Run of Same Responses

cnb_lnb_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Short Letter-N-Back (2 back)

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
